description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Debian that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build and multiarch. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, uses a matrix strategy to run on different compilers and Docker images, and performs a release build, daily build, VirusTotal scan, and release upload. The multiarch job runs on ubuntu-24.04-arm, uses a matrix strategy to run on different architectures, compilers, and Docker images, and performs a release build, daily build, and release upload.
